description: Tracks rule violations and corrections across weeks. Rules strengthened 3+ times are flagged as 'not sticking'.

no_mac_installs_by_default.note: Installed model on Mac unnecessarily. Default to non-Mac hosts.

enterprise_directory_discipline.note: Duplicated kokoro server to ~/Code/ instead of checking ~/Enterprise Home/Services/.

use_message_tool_not_exec_cli.note: Used exec+openclaw CLI for outbound message instead of first-class tool.

config_id_prefix_validation.note: Double-prefix in model ID caused 400 errors (openrouter/openrouter/hunter-alpha). Task #356 failed to persist fix.

no_guessing_emails.note: Guessed Kabiru's email incorrectly as kabiru@curacel.co

no_writing_to_prod_directly.note: Wrote to production DB before verifying local rebuild.

audio_field_consistency.note: Missed audio field in first publish attempt.

password_exposed_in_chat.note: Exposed henryimascot@gmail.com password TWICE in same session (08:34 and 08:42 UTC). Second exposure happened AFTER lesson was logged about first. Tool parameters (camofox_type) can log secrets.
password_exposed_in_chat.fix: Never pass credentials as tool params. Use manual entry or secure injection. Change required for affected account.

search_before_project_questions.note: Gave generic answer about Claude Code SDK use cases instead of checking memory/projects/ first. Real answer was in memory: RFP agent, Claims Garage, SiteInsight, gateway all use raw API keys.
search_before_project_questions.fix: Any 'our projects'/'use cases for us' question → grep memory/projects/ and memory/sessions/ before answering.

dont_ask_permission_for_obvious_fixes.note: Asked Henry 'Want me to generate the cover image?' after he pointed out I missed the blog hero image step. The fix was on the autonomous list — asking added unnecessary friction.
dont_ask_permission_for_obvious_fixes.fix: Notice mistake → Fix it → Report. No 'should I?' for internal/autonomous fixes.
